propositions: Add a JWKS-backed JWT verifier selected by the 'jwt' auth strategy that validates signature, iss, aud, and exp/iat/nbf against trusted flat config and maps scope/scp to scopes.
Enforce algorithm pinning: reject alg:none and refuse to start if a symmetric algorithm is configured alongside a JWKS source to block RS256/HS256 confusion.
Validate aud strictly against the single resource auth_resource_server_url and optionally enforce a header typ check when auth_jwt_expected_typ is set to prevent cross-JWT replay.
Make JWKS fetching SSRF-safe: jwks_uri fixed from config, HTTPS-only, bounded timeout, and private/link-local hosts rejected unless explicitly allowed.
Guard against unknown-kid flooding by capping JWKS refetch to at most one per cooldown window while still refetching after legitimate key rotation.
Treat JWKS fetch failure as a raise (deny) distinct from a definitively-invalid token which returns None, and register the auth_jwt_* keys in the manifest and reference docs.
